title_original: Qatar Sends Identical Message to UN, UNSC Concerning Iranian Attack on Its Territory
content_original: New York, March 02 (QNA) - The State of Qatar has sent an identical message to each of HE Secretary-General of the United Nations (UN) Antonio Guterres and HE Permanent Representative of the United States of America to the UN and President of the UN Security Council (UNSC) for the month of March Michael Waltz regarding the Iranian aggression against its territory that constitutes a flagrant violation of its national sovereignty, a direct infringement upon its security and territorial integrity, and an unacceptable escalation that threatens the security and stability of the region.
title_en: Qatar Sends Identical Message to UN, UNSC Concerning Iranian Attack on Its Territory
summary_en: Qatar has formally complained to UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres and UN Security Council President Michael Waltz regarding Iranian aggression against Qatari territory, calling it a flagrant violation of national sovereignty, a direct infringement on security and territorial integrity, and an unacceptable escalation threatening regional security and stability.

title_en: Israel bombs Tehran, Beirut; Trump says war to last 4 weeks
summary_en: Israel launched airstrikes on Tehran and Beirut. Trump stated the war would last 4 weeks. This represents a significant escalation with Israel directly targeting Iranian territory and Beirut (Hezbollah command), while the US president provides a timeline for hostilities.

title_original: Iranian missiles, interceptions seen over Israel
Witness describes Israeli-US ‘double-tap’ strike on downtown Tehran
content_original: A witness says the US and Israel bombed civilians in Tehran, as they rushed to help survivors from another bombing.
title_en: Witness describes Israeli-US 'double-tap' strike on downtown Tehran
summary_en: US and Israeli forces conducted a 'double-tap' bombing raid on downtown Tehran, striking the same location twice to target civilians who rushed to help survivors from the initial attack. This tactic—hitting rescuers with a follow-up strike—is considered a grave violation of international humanitarian law and represents a significant escalation in the ongoing Iran-US/Israel conflict.

title_original: ولي العهد السعودي يبحث مع رئيس الاتحاد السويسري التصعيد العسكري الذي تشهده المنطقة

title_en: Saudi Crown Prince Discusses Regional Military Escalation with Swiss President
summary_en: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammad bin Salman spoke by phone with Swiss President Guy Parmelin about the military escalation in the region. The discussion represents diplomatic engagement amid the ongoing Iran-US conflict and broader regional tensions, though no specific details of the conversation were provided.

content_original: نيويورك في 02 مارس /قنا/ دعا أنطونيو غوتيريش الأمين العام للأمم المتحدة، إلى خفض التصعيد في منطقة الشرق الأوسط، والوقف الفوري للأعمال العدائية، مؤكدا ضرورة إجراء حوار ومفاوضات حقيقية بين أطراف الصراع، بما يتماشى مع ميثاق الأمم المتحدة.
title_en: UN Secretary-General calls for de-escalation in Middle East
summary_en: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres called for de-escalation in the Middle East and immediate cessation of hostilities, emphasizing the need for genuine dialogue and negotiations between conflict parties in accordance with the UN Charter. The statement reflects ongoing diplomatic efforts to address the broader Iran-US conflict and related regional tensions.

title_original: البحرين تعلن إسقاط 70 صاروخا و76 طائرة مسيرة إيرانية
content_original: المنامة في 02 مارس /قنا/ أعلنت القيادة العامة لقوة دفاع البحرين، أن منظومات الدفاع الجوي نجحت منذ السبت الماضي، في التصدي وإسقاط 70 صاروخا إيرانيا و76 طائرة مسيرة، مؤكدة أنها ماضية بكل عزم وحزم في التصدي لكافة الاعتداءات الإيرانية التي لا تزال تستهدف عشوائيا بالصواريخ والمسيرات مناطق متفرقة من البلاد.
title_en: Bahrain announces downing 70 Iranian missiles and 76 drones
summary_en: Bahrain's air defense systems have successfully intercepted and downed 70 Iranian missiles and 76 drones since Saturday, according to the country's General Command. The attacks represent continued Iranian strikes targeting Bahraini territory, with the leadership affirming continued determination to confront Iranian aggression. Bahrain hosts the US 5th Fleet, making it a strategic US ally in the Gulf targeted by Iranian munitions.

title_original: القيادة العامة للقوات المسلحة الأردنية تنفي استهداف العراق من أراضي الأردن
content_original: عمان في 02 مارس /قنا/ نفت القيادة العامة للقوات المسلحة الأردنية، اليوم، مزاعم تدعي تعرض العراق لهجوم عبر طائرات ومسيرات انطلقت من أراضي الأردن.
title_en: Jordanian Armed Forces Deny Targeting Iraq from Jordanian Territory
summary_en: Jordan's Armed Forces have denied claims that Iraq was attacked via aircraft and drones launched from Jordanian territory. This denial comes amid ongoing regional tensions and as Iraq remains an active front with Iranian proxy forces (PMF) and US military bases present.

title_original: الجيش الأمريكي يعلن ارتفاع عدد قتلاه خلال العمليات القتالية الجارية إلى 6 جنود

title_en: US Army announces increase in combat deaths to 6 soldiers in ongoing operations against Iran
summary_en: US Central Command announced that the number of American soldiers killed in the ongoing combat operations between the United States and Israel against Iran has risen to six. This represents the first confirmed US combat deaths in the 2026 Iran-US conflict, signaling a significant escalation in direct military engagement between the two nations.

title_en: Qatar sends identical message to UN and Security Council regarding Iranian aggression on its territory
summary_en: Qatar has sent identical diplomatic messages to UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres and US Ambassador Michael Waltz (presiding over the Security Council for March) regarding Iranian aggression on Qatari territory. The communication represents Qatar formally documenting and protesting Iranian military action against its sovereign territory through international diplomatic channels. This indicates the conflict has expanded to include attacks on Qatar, a key US ally hosting the major Al-Udeid Air Base, with Doha now escalatng the matter to the UN Security Council.

title_en: American President: I ordered to strike Iran to halt its nuclear and missile programs
summary_en: US President Donald Trump announced he ordered military strikes against Iran to halt its nuclear ambitions and ballistic missile program, which he said was developing at a rapid pace. The strikes target Iran's most strategic capabilities—its nuclear facilities and missile infrastructure—representing a major escalation in the ongoing US-Iran armed conflict.

title_original: استشهاد أحد منتسبي القوة البحرية بالجيش الكويتي
البحرين تبعث برسالة نيابة عن دول مجلس التعاون إلى أمين عام الأمم المتحدة بشأن الهجمات الصاروخية الإيرانية
content_original: نيويورك في 02 مارس /قنا/ أرسلت البعثة الدائمة لمملكة البحرين لدى الأمم المتحدة وبالنيابة عن دول مجلس التعاون لدول الخليج العربية، وبصفتها رئيسا للدورة الحالية السادسة والأربعين لمجلس التعاون، خطابا إلى أنطونيو غوتيريش الأمين العام للأمم المتحدة، وذلك للفت الانتباه وبصورة عاجلة إلى الهجمات الصاروخية الإيرانية التي استهدفت عددا من دول المنطقة.
title_en: Bahrain sends message on behalf of GCC states to UN Secretary-General regarding Iranian missile attacks
summary_en: Bahrain's permanent mission to the United Nations, in its capacity as chair of the 46th GCC session and on behalf of Gulf Cooperation Council states, sent an urgent letter to UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres drawing attention to Iranian missile attacks targeting several countries in the region.

title_original: الرئيس الإماراتي ونظيره الإندونيسي يبحثان تداعيات التصعيد العسكري في المنطقة
content_original: أبوظبي في 02 مارس /قنا/ بحث سمو الشيخ محمد بن زايد آل نهيان رئيس دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، في اتصال هاتفي اليوم، مع نظيره الإندونيسي برابوو سوبيانتو، مستجدات الأوضاع الإقليمية في ظل التصعيد العسكري القائم وتداعياته الخطيرة على الأمن والاستقرار الإقليمي والدولي.
title_en: UAE President and Indonesian Counterpart Discuss Implications of Regional Military Escalation
summary_en: UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan held a phone call with Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto to discuss regional developments amid ongoing military escalation and its dangerous implications for regional and international security and stability. The discussion reflects diplomatic efforts by Gulf states to address the fallout from the Iran-US conflict and broader regional tensions.

title_original: وزير الخارجية السعودي يبحث هاتفيا مع نظيرته الكندية مستجدات الأوضاع في المنطقة
ارتفاع حصيلة ضحايا الاعتداءات الإسرائيلية على لبنان إلى 52 قتيلا و154 مصابا
content_original: بيروت في 02 مارس /قنا/ ارتفعت حصيلة ضحايا الاعتداءات الإسرائيلية على لبنان، اليوم، لتسجل مقتل 52 لبنانيا وإصابة 154 شخصا.
title_en: Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon rises to 52 killed and 154 injured
summary_en: Israeli forces carried out attacks on Lebanon today, resulting in 52 killed and 154 injured. The casualties mark a significant escalation in cross-border hostilities between Israel and Lebanon, where Hezbollah operates as an IRGC proxy linked to the broader Iran-US conflict.

content_original: أبوظبي في 02 مارس /قنا/ أعلنت دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، أن الجهات المختصة في إمارة أبوظبي تعاملت مع حريق نشب نتيجة استهداف بطائرة مسيرة لموقع محطة خزانات للوقود في منطقة مصفح.
title_en: Control of fire that broke out at fuel storage station in Abu Dhabi following drone strike
summary_en: UAE authorities contained a fire at a fuel storage station in the Mussafah area of Abu Dhabi after it was targeted by a drone strike. The incident represents another attack on critical energy infrastructure in the Gulf region, likely carried out by Houthi forces (an Iran proxy), targeting a key US ally's petroleum facilities.

title_original: الرئيس التركي: أولويتنا وقف إطلاق النار بالمنطقة وفتح باب الحوار

أوزبكستان وكازاخستان والهند تؤكد تضامنها مع البحرين في ظل الهجمات الإيرانية
content_original: المنامة في 02 مارس /قنا/ تلقى الملك حمد بن عيسى آل خليفة ملك مملكة البحرين، اليوم، رسالة خطية من رئيس أوزبكستان شوكت ميرضيائيف، أعرب فيها عن دعمه وتضامنه مع مملكة البحرين في ضوء التصعيد الحاد الذي تشهده منطقة الشرق الأوسط وما تعرضت له المملكة من أعمال عسكرية عدائية.
title_en: Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, and India confirm solidarity with Bahrain amid Iranian attacks
summary_en: Uzbekistan's President sent a written message to Bahrain's King expressing support and solidarity in light of the sharp escalation in the Middle East and the hostile military actions the kingdom has been subjected to. Kazakhstan and India also confirmed their solidarity with Bahrain. The message comes as Bahrain, which hosts the US Navy's 5th Fleet, faces Iranian threats amid the ongoing Iran-US conflict.

title_original: رئاسة الأركان الكويتية تعلن استشهاد رقيب ثان من منتسبي القوة البحرية
السعودية تدين الهجمات الإيرانية على دول مجلس التعاون والأردن

title_en: Saudi Arabia condemns Iranian attacks on GCC countries and Jordan
summary_en: Saudi Arabia has strongly condemned the Iranian attacks that targeted Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, and Jordan. This represents Iran's expansion of attacks beyond US military bases to include Gulf Cooperation Council states and Jordan, marking a significant regional escalation in the Iran-US conflict.

title_original: سمو الأمير يتلقى اتصالا هاتفيا من الأمين العام للأمم المتحدة
وزارتا العمل والتجارة والصناعة توصيان باستمرار العمل عن بعد لمنشآت القطاع الخاص
وزير الداخلية يترأس اجتماع مجلس الدفاع المدني لمتابعة مستجدات الأوضاع الراهنة
قطر تجدد إدانتها بأشد العبارات الهجمات الإيرانية على أراضيها وتؤكد أن الحروب بيئة مثلى لجميع انتهاكات حقوق الإنسان
content_original: جنيف في 02 مارس /قنا/ جددت دولة قطر إدانتها بأشد العبارات الهجمات الإيرانية التي استهدفت أراضيها، وعدتها انتهاكا صريحا لسيادتها وسلامة أراضيها وأمنها، وخرقا واضحا لقواعد القانون الدولي، وللمبادئ المنصوص عليها في ميثاق الأمم المتحدة، لاسيما المادة 2 (4) التي تحظر "استخدام القوة" ضد الدول الأخرى.
title_en: Qatar renews strongest condemnation of Iranian attacks on its territory, deems them violation of sovereignty and international law
summary_en: Qatar has condemned in the strongest terms the Iranian attacks on its territory, calling them a clear violation of its sovereignty, territorial integrity, and security, as well as a breach of international law and UN Charter Article 2(4) prohibiting the use of force against other states. The statement is significant as Qatar hosts the major US Al-Udeid air base, a key US military installation in the region.

summary_en: Qatar's Foreign Ministry confirmed that Iranian attacks on Qatari territory threaten good neighborly relations and the understanding on which bilateral relations were built. summary_en: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu visited Beit Shemesh, the site of an Iranian missile strike that killed 9 people. content_original: Gaza, March 1 (QNA) - Two Palestinians have been killed and several others injured today in an Israeli artillery shelling that targeted the Al-Jurn area in Jabaliain the northern Gaza Strip, medical sources reported.

The strike signifies continued Israeli operations against targets in Gaza amidst the broader regional conflict.

content_original: Abu Dhabi, March 01 (QNA) - The Emirati Ministry of Defense has announced that the United Arab Emirates (UAE) air force and air defense forces destroyed 20 ballistic missiles, two cruise missiles, and 311 drones, on the morning of the second day of the Iranian attack.
title_en: Iranian Attack on UAE Causes Three Fatalities and 58 Injuries
summary_en: Iran launched a significant attack on the UAE, resulting in three fatalities and 58 minor injuries. This incident highlights the escalating tensions and direct military confrontation between Iran and the UAE amidst the ongoing conflict.

title_en: Oman Condemns and Denounces Iranian Attacks on Gulf States and Jordan

title_original: فلسطين تدين بشدة الهجمات الإيرانية على دول عربية

title_en: Palestine Condemns Iranian Attacks on Arab States
summary_en: Palestine has strongly condemned Iran's attacks on Arab states, emphasizing its rejection of any violation of sovereignty and territorial integrity. This condemnation reflects regional tensions and concerns over Iran's military actions amid the ongoing conflict.

title_original: الرئيس المصري والعاهل الأردني يبحثان هاتفيا التطورات في المنطقة

summary_en: The Organization of Islamic Cooperation has condemned Iran's attacks on the sovereignty and territories of neighboring member states, calling it an unacceptable escalation and a threat to regional stability with serious implications for peace and security in the region.

title_en: Kuwait and Jordan Call for Immediate De-escalation in the Region

title_en: French President Macron denies French involvement in US-Israeli attack on Iran

title_en: Yemen Condemns Iranian Attacks on Sovereignty of Multiple Nations
summary_en: Yemen has strongly condemned Iran's attacks targeting the territories and sovereignty of several countries, calling it a blatant violation of the UN Charter and international law. The condemnation reflects broader geopolitical tensions and alliances in the Middle East.

title_original: البحرين تدين الهجمات الصاروخية الإيرانية على عدد من دول المنطقة

title_en: Bahrain Condemns Iranian Missile Attacks on Regional Countries

title_en: Organization of Islamic Cooperation Condemns Iranian Attacks on Arab States

title_original: الرئيس التركي يؤكد رفضه للهجمات الإيرانية على دول الخليج

This indicates heightened international concern over the ongoing hostilities and their potential for regional and global impact.

summary_en: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman received a phone call from US President Donald Trump. The call likely discussed the ongoing Iran-US conflict and regional security issues. This signifies continued coordination between Saudi Arabia and the US amid regional tensions.

This highlights the ongoing regional tensions and the international community's efforts to mitigate the conflict's impact on neighboring states.

title_en: Qatari Human Rights Committee condemns Iranian attacks on Qatar
summary_en: The Qatari National Human Rights Committee has condemned Iran's military attacks targeting Qatar, highlighting that these attacks violate the UN Charter and international law, and challenge state sovereignty. This is significant as it indicates an escalation of the conflict into the Gulf region, posing a direct threat to Qatar's security and regional stability.

title_original: الخارجية تستدعي السفير الإيراني وتعبر عن احتجاجها الشديد واستيائها البالغ ورفضها القاطع لاستهداف أراضي قطر

This incident highlights escalating tensions in the Gulf region amid the ongoing Iran-US conflict, with potential implications for regional stability and US interests in Qatar.

title_en: OIC Secretary-General Calls for End to Israeli Occupation and Settlement Plans
summary_en: The Secretary-General of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation, Hussein Ibrahim Taha, emphasized that Israel has no sovereignty over occupied Palestinian territories, including Gaza, the West Bank, and East Jerusalem. This statement underscores the ongoing tensions and conflicts related to Israeli occupation and settlement expansion, which are directly linked to the broader regional conflict involving Iran, Hezbollah, and other actors.

title_original: وزير الخارجية السعودي يبحث مع نظرائه  في تركيا ومصر وعمان المستجدات الإقليمية

title_en: 5 Palestinians killed in Israeli strikes on Khan Younis and Al-Bureij refugee camp in Gaza
summary_en: Israeli forces conducted strikes on Khan Younis and Al-Bureij refugee camp in Gaza, resulting in the deaths of five Palestinians and multiple injuries. This incident highlights ongoing Israeli operations in Gaza amidst the broader regional conflict. The strikes are part of Israel's efforts to target Hamas and other groups in Gaza.

title_en: OIC foreign ministers condemn Israeli settlement activities in West Bank and Jerusalem
summary_en: The Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) foreign ministers have condemned Israel's illegal settlement activities in the West Bank and Jerusalem. This condemnation highlights ongoing tensions between Israel and Islamic countries regarding Israeli actions in Palestinian territories. The strategic significance involves regional stability and potential escalation in Israeli-Palestinian conflict dynamics.

summary_en: An Israeli strike in northern Gaza resulted in the death of a Palestinian. This incident highlights ongoing tensions and military activity in the region, with potential implications for the broader conflict involving Israel and Palestinian factions.

title_en: IAEA Announces Local Ceasefire Near Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant
summary_en: The IAEA has announced a localized ceasefire near the Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant to enable the restoration of the backup power line. This development is significant as the plant has faced repeated power disruptions due to the ongoing conflict, raising concerns about nuclear safety.

summary_en: Egypt's Foreign Minister discussed the latest developments in US-Iran negotiations in Geneva with his Iranian counterpart and the IAEA director. This is significant as it indicates diplomatic efforts amid ongoing US-Iran hostilities and potential implications for regional stability and Iran's nuclear program.

summary_en: Approximately 100,000 Palestinians attended Friday prayers at Al-Aqsa Mosque in Jerusalem, despite Israeli restrictions and occupation measures. This event occurred during the second Friday of Ramadan, highlighting ongoing tensions and the significance of religious gatherings in the region amid the broader conflict.

title_en: 3 killed in landmine explosion in western Deir ez-Zor, eastern Syria
summary_en: Three people were killed and one injured when a landmine, likely a remnant from previous conflicts, exploded under their vehicle in the Deir ez-Zor desert in eastern Syria. The incident highlights the ongoing threat posed by unexploded ordnance in conflict zones, affecting civilians in the region. This area has seen past military activity due to the Syrian civil war and related conflicts involving various factions.

summary_en: US Vice President J.D. Vance and Omani Foreign Minister Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi reviewed indirect US-Iran negotiations and diplomatic efforts for a nuclear agreement to ensure Iran's nuclear program remains peaceful. The meeting in Washington highlights ongoing diplomatic engagement amid the armed conflict, with potential implications for de-escalation.

The strikes indicate potential escalation amid ongoing regional tensions and possible coordination with other actions against Iran-linked targets.

summary_en: Israel has launched an attack on Iran, with explosions reported in the capital Tehran. summary_en: Iraq has closed its airspace due to ongoing airstrikes targeting Tehran and other Iranian cities. title_en: Iran Announces Closure of Airspace
summary_en: Iran has closed its airspace following a series of explosions in Tehran. This move likely aims to protect critical infrastructure and respond to perceived threats amid ongoing conflict with the US. The closure could impact regional air travel and signal heightened tensions.

title_original: الرئيس الأمريكي يعلن انطلاق عملية عسكرية أمريكية واسعة ضد إيران

title_en: US President Announces Large-Scale Military Operation Against Iran
summary_en: US President Donald Trump announced the launch of a major military operation inside Iran in response to Tehran's efforts to rebuild its nuclear program and develop long-range missile capabilities. The operation marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran, with potential implications for regional stability and global security.

title_original: الكويت تعلن إلغاء جميع الرحلات الجوية المتجهة إلى إيران
content_original: الكويت في 28 فبراير /قنا/ أعلنت الهيئة العامة للطيران المدني الكويتية اليوم، وقف وإلغاء جميع الرحلات الجوية المتجهة من دولة الكويت إلى إيران حتى إشعار آخر نظرا للأوضاع السياسية والعسكرية الراهنة التي تمر بها المنطقة وما ترتب عليها من إغلاق كامل للأجواء الإيرانية.
title_en: Kuwait Cancels All Flights to Iran
summary_en: Kuwait has suspended and canceled all flights to Iran indefinitely due to the ongoing political and military situation in the region, including the complete closure of Iranian airspace. This decision reflects the escalating tensions and potential risks posed by the conflict between Iran and the US.

title_original: هيئة الطيران المدني في الإمارات تعلن عن إغلاق مؤقت وجزئي للمجال الجوي
content_original: أبوظبي في 28 فبراير /قنا/ أعلنت الهيئة العامة للطيران المدني في الإمارات، عن إغلاق مؤقت وجزئي للمجال الجوي لدولة الإمارات، كإجراء احترازي استثنائي يهدف إلى تأمين سلامة الرحلات الجوية والطواقم وحماية أراضي الدولة، في ظل تسارع وتصعيد التطورات الأمنية في المنطقة.
title_en: UAE Civil Aviation Authority Announces Temporary Partial Closure of Airspace
summary_en: The UAE has partially and temporarily closed its airspace as an exceptional precautionary measure to ensure the safety of flights and crews amid escalating regional security developments. This action is likely linked to the ongoing conflict between Iran and the US, reflecting heightened concerns over potential threats to aviation safety in the region.

title_original: البحرين تعلن وقوع اعتداءات استهدفت مواقع ومنشآت داخل حدودها

title_en: Bahrain Reports Attacks on Sites and Facilities Within Its Borders
summary_en: Bahrain has announced that attacks targeted sites and facilities within its territory, launched from outside its borders, violating its sovereignty and security. This incident is significant as Bahrain hosts a major US naval base and is part of the ongoing regional conflict involving Iran and its proxies.

title_en: Syrian Civil Aviation Authority Temporarily Closes Southern Airspace
summary_en: The Syrian Civil Aviation Authority has temporarily closed southern airspace corridors for 12 hours, likely due to ongoing regional military activities or threats. This could impact regional air traffic and potentially indicate security concerns related to the ongoing conflict involving Iran and US forces in the region.

title_en: UAE Defense Ministry Reports Successful Interception of Iranian Ballistic Missile Attack
summary_en: The UAE Defense Ministry announced that the UAE successfully intercepted multiple Iranian ballistic missiles targeting the country. UAE air defenses demonstrated high efficiency in countering the attack. This incident highlights the ongoing threat posed by Iranian missile capabilities in the region and the UAE's readiness to defend against such attacks.

title_en: Kuwaiti Army Air Defense Intercepts Aerial Threats in Kuwaiti Airspace
summary_en: The Kuwaiti Army Air Defense has intercepted aerial threats detected in Kuwaiti airspace, following standard operational procedures and engagement rules. This incident highlights the heightened regional tensions and potential threats to Gulf states amid the ongoing US-Iran conflict.

summary_en: Jordanian armed forces successfully intercepted and downed two ballistic missiles targeting its territory. The incident highlights the ongoing threat to regional stability as the conflict between Iran and the US continues to spill over into neighboring countries. title_original: 35,000 Worshipers Perform Isha, Taraweeh Prayers at Al Aqsa Mosque
content_original: Occupied Jerusalem, February 26 (QNA) - Some 35,000 worshipers performed the Isha and Taraweeh prayers at Al Aqsa Mosque Thursday, despite the restrictions and measures imposed by the Israeli occupation authorities on access to the Old City.
title_en: 35,000 Worshipers Perform Prayers at Al Aqsa Amid Israeli Restrictions
summary_en: Around 35,000 worshipers conducted prayers at Al Aqsa Mosque in Jerusalem, defying Israeli restrictions on access to the Old City. This event highlights ongoing tensions and the impact of Israeli security measures on Palestinian religious practices. The situation could escalate if confrontations occur between worshipers and Israeli forces.

title_original: Israel's Actions in West Bank, Gaza Aim for Permanent Demographic Change, Warns UN Official
content_original: Geneva, February 26 (QNA) - UN High Commissioner for Human Rights Volker Turk warned that Israel's actions in the occupied West Bank and Gaza, including military operations causing displacement, aimed at creating a permanent demographic change, raising concerns over potential ethnic cleansing.
title_en: UN Official Warns of Israel's Demographic Change Actions in West Bank, Gaza
summary_en: UN High Commissioner for Human Rights Volker Turk has warned that Israel's military operations in the occupied West Bank and Gaza, which are causing displacement, aim to create a permanent demographic change, raising concerns of potential ethnic cleansing. This development is significant as it highlights the ongoing tensions and potential war crimes allegations against Israel amidst the broader regional conflict involving Iran-linked groups like Hamas.

title_original: Omani Foreign Minister Says US-Iran Negotiations Make Significant Progress
content_original: Geneva, February 26 (QNA) - Omani Foreign Minister Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi confirmed that the third round of indirect nuclear negotiations between the United States and Iran, which concluded Thursday in Geneva, achieved significant progress.
title_en: Omani FM: US-Iran Nuclear Talks Make Significant Progress
summary_en: Omani Foreign Minister Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi announced that the third round of indirect nuclear negotiations between the US and Iran in Geneva has made significant progress. This development is significant as it could potentially de-escalate tensions in the ongoing US-Iran conflict and address Iran's nuclear program. The progress in negotiations may have broader implications for regional stability and the trajectory of the armed conflict.

title_original: Ministry of Municipality Launches Initiative for Cleaning Workers at MIA
One Person Killed, 29 Injured in Israeli Airstrikes on Eastern Lebanon
content_original: Beirut, February 26 (QNA) - One person was killed and 29 others were injured Thursday in airstrikes launched by the Israel on the Bekaa Valley, eastern Lebanon.
title_en: Israeli Airstrikes Kill One, Injure 29 in Eastern Lebanon
summary_en: Israeli airstrikes targeted the Bekaa Valley in eastern Lebanon, resulting in one fatality and 29 injuries. This incident highlights ongoing tensions and military activity on Israel's northern border amid the broader conflict. The strikes are likely linked to Israeli operations against Hezbollah or other Iran-backed groups in the region.

title_original: Arab League Stresses Importance of Continued and Increased Support for UNRWA
content_original: Cairo, February 26 (QNA) - The Arab League affirmed Thursday the importance of continuing and increasing support for the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees (UNRWA) and all efforts aimed at providing relief to the Palestinian people.
title_en: Arab League Stresses Importance of Continued and Increased Support for UNRWA

title_original: Two Martyred, Several Injured in Israeli Occupation Strike East of Gaza City
content_original: Gaza, February 26 (QNA) - Two Palestinians were martyred and several others injured on Thursday in an Israeli occupation airstrike targeting eastern Gaza City.
title_en: Two Martyred, Several Injured in Israeli Occupation Strike East of Gaza City

content_original: Damascus, February 26 (QNA) - Syrian Foreign Minister Asaad Al Shaibani held talks in Damascus on Thursday with a European Union diplomatic delegation on prospects for advancing bilateral relations and facilitating the return of Syrian refugees.
title_en: Syrian FM Discusses Ties, Refugee Return with EU Delegation

title_original: HH the Amir Sends Condolences to Amir of Kuwait

title_en: HH the Amir Sends Condolences to Amir of Kuwait

title_original: Israel Launches Airstrikes on Eastern Lebanon
content_original: Beirut, February 26 (QNA) - Israeli warplanes launched Thursday a series of airstrikes on eastern Lebanon. Lebanon's National News Agency (NNA) reported a series of violent explosions in the Bekaa Valley, coinciding with low-altitude flights by Israeli warplanes.
title_en: Israel Launches Airstrikes on Eastern Lebanon

title_original: Egyptian President Discusses Regional Developments with Sudanese Prime Minister
content_original: Cairo, February 26 (QNA) - Egyptian President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi met on Thursday with Sudanese Prime Minister Kamil Idris, who is currently visiting Cairo, to discuss the latest developments in Sudan as well as regional issues.
title_en: Egyptian President Discusses Regional Developments with Sudanese Prime Minister

title_original: Qatar Reiterates Its Firm Stance, Unwavering Support for Unity, Territorial Integrity of Sudan
content_original: Geneva, February 26 (QNA) - The State of Qatar reiterated its firm and supportive stance on the unity and territorial integrity of Sudan, and the right of its fraternal people to live in dignity, security and stability, and rejected any form of interference in its internal affairs, voicing deep concern over the continuation of the war and the accompanying crimes and grave human rights violations, which have led to the loss of thousands of Sudanese lives and property and the displacement of millions of them, in addition to the unprecedented destruction of infrastructure.
title_en: Qatar Reiterates Its Firm Stance, Unwavering Support for Unity, Territorial Integrity of Sudan

title_original: Qatar Reaffirms Commitment to Role as Active International Partner
content_original: Geneva, February 26 (QNA) - Qatar reaffirmed its commitment to playing an active international role and continuing its mediation efforts, which have contributed, through its UN-sponsored hosting of meetings of special envoys on Afghanistan and priority working groups, to strengthening international consensus on key issues by providing an inclusive platform for dialogue and coordination.
title_en: Qatar Reaffirms Commitment to Role as Active International Partner

title_original: Russia Denies Setting Any Timeline for Settlement with Ukraine
content_original: Moscow, February 26 (QNA) - Russia on Thursday denied setting any final timeline for settling with Ukraine.
title_en: Russia Denies Setting Any Timeline for Settlement with Ukraine

title_original: UN Reports Nearly 8,000 Dead or Missing Along Migration Routes Last Year
content_original: Geneva, February 26 (QNA) -The International Organization for Migration (IOM) announced on Thursday that nearly 8,000 people died or went missing last year along irregular migration routes, calling for the expansion of safe and regular pathways and the protection of vulnerable individuals regardless of their status.
title_en: UN Reports Nearly 8,000 Dead or Missing Along Migration Routes Last Year

title_original: NHRC: Ethical Governance of Artificial Intelligence an Urgent Necessity

title_en: NHRC: Ethical Governance of Artificial Intelligence an Urgent Necessity

title_original: Minister of Environment and Climate Change to QNA: Environment Day an Opportunity to Evaluate Environmental Work Progress

title_en: Qatar Participates in Arab Meeting to Adopt Regional Action Plan for Implementation of International Humanitarian Law 2026-2027
